name: Synthetic NDA fixture
description: Wholly synthetic bidirectional NDA scenario for end-to-end Alpha v0.1 evaluation (Milestone 4C). Counterparty uses the IANA example.test domain; amounts, dates, and party names are obviously invented. No real client / counterparty / BOF facts. This file is loaded by the alpha-evaluation runner (scripts/run-alpha-evaluation.ts) and MUST NOT be used to seed real workflows.
project_name: Synthetic NDA — joint product evaluation Q1

intake_answers.purpose: Joint product evaluation for a synthetic integration project

source_contents.synthetic_nda_term_sheet.pdf:
TERM SHEET (synthetic test fixture — no real party data).

Counterparty: Example Test Corp, Ltd. (example.test domain).
Subject: Mutual non-disclosure for joint product evaluation.
Term: 24 months from execution, auto-renewing 12 months unless 30-day written notice.
Confidential info: written, oral, electronic forms; technical and commercial materials.
Carve-outs: independently developed; publicly known through no fault of recipient; rightfully obtained from a third party without confidentiality obligation; legally compelled disclosure with prompt notice.
Return / destruction: upon request or expiration, within 14 days.
Governing law: Republic of Korea. Forum: Seoul Central District Court.
Non-circumvention: 12 months post-termination.
(Synthetic fixture; do NOT treat as a real proposal.)
source_contents.synthetic_nda_counterparty_email.eml:
From: counterparty@synthetic.example.test
Subject: NDA draft — please send

Hi,

Thanks for the discussion. Please send your standard mutual NDA draft for review. We will need a 24-month confidentiality period and standard carve-outs. We prefer Korean law and Seoul venue.

Best,
Synthetic Counterparty
(Synthetic fixture — no real sender.)
source_contents.synthetic_nda_internal_brief.docx: Internal brief (synthetic). Engagement: synthetic joint product evaluation. Sensitivity: high — technical roadmap details may be shared. Internal counsel preference: mutual NDA, 24-month term, standard residual-knowledge clause acceptable, no IP assignment language. (Synthetic fixture.)

issue_decisions.partial_note: Acceptable with explicit residual-knowledge carve-out limited to general know-how
